evidence.description: FIND-SPEC-FILTER-012 RESOLVED — §4.1 catalog now contains exactly one definition each for EC-S-005 (rapid keystroke + Esc before debounce) and EC-S-010 (Esc with no pending debounce). REQ-FILTER-003 inline references at lines 246-248 are now cross-references to §4.1, not redefinitions. §4.4 reverse-lookup index lists every EC ID exactly once.

FIND-SPEC-FILTER-013 RESOLVED — sortByUpdatedAt is now a curried factory with consistent signature: `(direction: 'asc'|'desc') => (a: { noteId, updatedAt }, b: { noteId, updatedAt }) => number`. §1.5, §2 pseudocode, and verification-architecture.md §1 lines 63-68 all agree. computeVisible projects noteIds to {noteId, updatedAt} pairs before sorting; noteMetadata is no longer a parameter to sortByUpdatedAt.

FIND-SPEC-FILTER-015 PARTIALLY RESOLVED — `reconstructedState` shorthand is gone; pseudocode now lists every FeedViewState field explicitly. Provenance table at lines 184-199 enumerates 13 fields with snapshot/preserved/derived classification. HOWEVER a new defect was introduced: `tagAutocompleteVisibleFor` is prescribed as straight pass-through, contradicting feedReducer.ts:62-66's stale-reference guard from ui-tag-chip. See FIND-SPEC-FILTER-017.

FIND-SPEC-FILTER-014 NOT RESOLVED. PROP-FILTER-022 cross-reference was changed from EC-S-001 to EC-T-001..EC-T-005, but EC-T-* are Sort edge cases per §4.2. None describes rapid-keystroke debounce coalescing. The §4.4 reverse-lookup confirms EC-T-* link only to REQ-FILTER-007/008/009/010, never to REQ-FILTER-002 (the requirement PROP-FILTER-022 verifies).
sortByUpdatedAt signature in verification-architecture is now consistent with behavioral-spec §1.5 / §2 (curried factory over {noteId, updatedAt}).

Iteration 2's adversarial coverage is preserved without regression: REQ-FILTER-005 enumerates Unicode behavior (toLowerCase ASCII fold only, toLocaleLowerCase prohibited, kana/kanji unchanged); REQ-FILTER-013 pins aria-labels and Tab order; REQ-FILTER-017 enumerates pathological inputs (control chars, 10k length, RTL, regex metacharacters, repeat Esc); EC-C-007 and EC-T-004 enumerate debounce-vs-snapshot and toggle-vs-debounce races.

Iteration 2's formal-tier setup preserved: PROP-FILTER-010 limits the case-insensitive equivalence claim to ASCII printable strings; arbitrary Unicode requires only no-throw. PROP-FILTER-005 frames feedReducer totality over arbitrary FeedAction including 0..10000-character SearchApplied.query. fast-check generators pinned to these boundaries. Tier 0/1/2/3 partition unchanged.

Done definition items 1-10 remain artifact-verifiable. Items 7 (REQ-FILTER-001..017 ↔ test) and 8 (PROP-FILTER-001..025 ↔ proof) are still blocked: PROP-FILTER-022 has no valid edge-case anchor (FIND-016) and Done item 4 implicitly demands DomainSnapshotReceived behavior that contradicts the existing reducer's tagAutocompleteVisibleFor logic (FIND-017). Convergence target remains unstable.

previousIterationFindings.FIND-SPEC-FILTER-011: RESOLVED (iter 3) — Done items 1-10 are artifact-verifiable; the new defects are about DomainSnapshotReceived field provenance and PROP-FILTER-022 traceability, not about Done definition framing.
previousIterationFindings.FIND-SPEC-FILTER-012: RESOLVED (iter 3) — §4.1 catalog is single source of truth; each EC-S-NNN ID appears exactly once; §4.4 reverse-lookup index added.
previousIterationFindings.FIND-SPEC-FILTER-013: RESOLVED (iter 3) — sortByUpdatedAt curried-factory signature unified across §1.5, §2 pseudocode, and verification-architecture.md §1.
previousIterationFindings.FIND-SPEC-FILTER-014: NOT RESOLVED — see FIND-SPEC-FILTER-016. PROP-FILTER-022 is now anchored to EC-T-001..EC-T-005 which are Sort edge cases, not search-debounce coalescing.
previousIterationFindings.FIND-SPEC-FILTER-015: PARTIALLY RESOLVED — reconstructedState removed and provenance table added, but tagAutocompleteVisibleFor row regresses ui-tag-chip's stale-reference guard. See FIND-SPEC-FILTER-017.
